# SammaPix — Free Image Tools for Photographers

> Browser-based image optimization suite. Free forever. No uploads. No account required for core tools.

## About

SammaPix is a comprehensive collection of browser-based image tools for photographers, developers, and content creators. All processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and Canvas APIs. Images never leave your device.

Created by Luca Sammarco, a travel photographer and developer who built these tools to solve real workflow problems.

## Tools Overview

### Core Tools (100% Free, No Account)

1. **Compress** (https://sammapix.com/tools/compress)
   - Compress JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF files up to 80-90% smaller without quality loss
   - Batch processing with ZIP download
   - Quality slider (0-100%)
   - Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF
   - Browser-based, zero server upload

2. **WebP Converter** (https://sammapix.com/tools/webp)
   - Convert any image format to WebP (25-34% smaller than JPEG)
   - Batch conversion with ZIP download
   - Quality control
   - Browser-based processing

3. **EXIF Lens** (https://sammapix.com/tools/exif)
   - Strip GPS location data from photos
   - Remove all EXIF metadata
   - Privacy protection for sensitive photos
   - Browser-based, zero server transmission

4. **HEIC Converter** (https://sammapix.com/tools/heic)
   - Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG or WebP
   - No upload limits
   - Batch processing
   - Supports HEIC, HEIF formats

5. **FilmLab** (https://sammapix.com/tools/filmlab)
   - 14 authentic analog film presets
   - Kodak Gold, Fuji, Ilford color science
   - 8 original SammaPix film profiles
   - Batch apply to multiple photos

6. **StampIt** (https://sammapix.com/tools/stampit)
   - Batch watermark photos with text or logo
   - 9 positioning options
   - Tiled filigrana/pattern watermarks
   - Font customization

7. **CropRatio** (https://sammapix.com/tools/croproatio)
   - Crop to exact aspect ratios
   - Presets: 1:1 (square), 16:9, 4:3, 3:2, A4, custom
   - Preview before crop
   - Batch crop multiple images

8. **TwinHunt** (https://sammapix.com/tools/twinhunt)
   - Find exact and near-duplicate photos using perceptual hashing
   - pHash algorithm for similarity detection
   - Organize duplicate photo libraries
   - Browser-based duplicate detection

9. **GeoSort** (https://sammapix.com/tools/geosort)
   - Sort photos by country using GPS EXIF data
   - Organize travel photo libraries by location
   - Requires EXIF GPS data in photos
   - HEIC support

10. **TravelMap** (https://sammapix.com/tools/travelmap)
    - Generate interactive map from travel photos
    - Visualize photo locations on world map
    - Requires GPS coordinates in EXIF data
    - Mapbox-powered interactive visualization

11. **ResizePack** (https://sammapix.com/tools/resizepack)
    - Resize images for social media platforms
    - Presets: Instagram (1:1, 4:5), Twitter (16:9), LinkedIn (1.91:1)
    - Batch resize with ZIP download
    - Custom dimensions available

12. **Cull** (https://sammapix.com/tools/cull)
    - Rate and cull photo shoots efficiently
    - Star rating system (1-5 stars)
    - Keyboard shortcuts for fast workflow
    - Export culled photos as ZIP
    - HEIC support

### AI-Powered Tools (Requires Free Account)

13. **AI Rename** (https://sammapix.com/tools/ai-rename)
    - AI generates SEO-optimized filenames and alt text
    - Google Gemini 1.5 Flash powered
    - Processes in under 3 seconds
    - Generates: filename, alt text, caption, tags
    - Free tier: 5 renames/day
    - Pro tier: 200+ renames/day

## Key Features

- **100% Free Core Tools** — No subscription required for compress, convert, resize, EXIF removal
- **Browser-Based Processing** — All image processing happens locally using JavaScript, Canvas API, and Web Workers
- **Privacy First** — Images never leave your device. No server uploads. No tracking of content.
- **Batch Processing** — Process multiple images at once, download as single ZIP file
- **AI-Powered Optimization** — Gemini Flash generates SEO filenames and alt text
- **No Account Required** — Most tools work anonymously. AI Rename requires free account to prevent API abuse.
- **Mobile & Desktop** — Responsive design works on phones, tablets, laptops
- **HEIC Support** — Convert iPhone photos across all tools
- **Offline Capable** — Tools work in offline mode (service worker)

## Technical Specifications

- **Framework** — Next.js 14 with App Router
- **Compression Library** — browser-image-compression (Canvas API)
- **Image Processing** — Native Canvas API, Web Workers
- **EXIF Handling** — piexifjs library
- **AI Integration** — Google Gemini 1.5 Flash API
- **Authentication** — NextAuth.js (Google, GitHub, Magic Link)
- **Storage** — Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) for user data
- **Hosting** — Cloudflare Pages with Edge Runtime
- **File Formats Supported** — JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC, HEIF

## Creator

**Luca Sammarco** — Travel photographer and developer
- Portfolio: https://lucasammarco.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/lucasammarco
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/lucasammarco

Luca created SammaPix after returning from photography trips to Asia with hundreds of files needing optimization. He solved the batch compression + renaming + format conversion workflow that other tools didn't address comprehensively.

## Pricing

- **Free Plan** — Core tools unlimited, AI Rename 5/day, batch limit 5 files
- **Pro Plan** — $7/month, all features unlimited, AI Rename 200+/day, batch 100 files, zero ads
- **API Access** — Available to Pro users for programmatic access

## Security & Privacy

- All image processing happens in browser — images never transmitted to servers
- For AI Rename, thumbnail (not full image) sent to Google Gemini API for analysis
- EXIF remover strips GPS and sensitive metadata
- No tracking or data collection on processed images
- Open source components used throughout

## Website Structure

- **Homepage** — Tool discovery and overview
- **/tools** — Complete tool directory with 13 image optimization tools
- **/about** — Creator story and workflow philosophy
- **/pricing** — Free vs Pro comparison
- **/blog** — SEO articles on image optimization
- **/portfolio** — Luca's travel photography galleries

## Programmatic Pages — Quick Convert

Quick conversion utility pages for common format conversions:

1. **/convert/heic-to-jpg** — Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG
2. **/convert/heic-to-png** — Convert iPhone HEIC photos to PNG
3. **/convert/png-to-webp** — Convert PNG to modern WebP format
4. **/convert/png-to-jpg** — Convert PNG to JPG
5. **/convert/jpg-to-webp** — Convert JPG to WebP
6. **/convert/jpeg-to-webp** — Convert JPEG to WebP
7. **/convert/webp-to-jpg** — Convert WebP back to JPG

## Programmatic Pages — Resize for Social Media

Quick resize utility pages for popular social platforms:

1. **/resize/instagram** — Resize for Instagram posts (1:1, 4:5, 16:9)
2. **/resize/facebook** — Resize for Facebook posts and covers
3. **/resize/twitter** — Resize for Twitter/X posts (16:9)
4. **/resize/tiktok** — Resize for TikTok videos (9:16)
5. **/resize/youtube-thumbnail** — Resize for YouTube thumbnails (1280x720)
6. **/resize/linkedin** — Resize for LinkedIn posts (1.91:1)
7. **/resize/pinterest** — Resize for Pinterest pins (1000x1500)

## Comparisons

SammaPix is positioned as an alternative to:
- TinyPNG (simpler UI, more tools, AI rename)
- Squoosh (batch processing, browser-based like Squoosh)
- ImageOptim (free tier, online)
- Compressor.io (online)
- ILoveImg (all-in-one image suite)
- VSCO (with optimization focus, not social)
- FilterPixel (presets, SammaPix has more)

See detailed comparisons at:
- https://sammapix.com/vs/tinypng
- https://sammapix.com/vs/squoosh
- https://sammapix.com/vs/imageoptim
